ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model associated with the experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment began */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment concluded */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment (e.g., ongoing, completed, paused) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of model (e.g., Accuracy Prob, Met Cost Gross) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the model */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movement_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the data belongs to */,
  "movement_duration_sse" REAL /* Sum of squared errors for movement duration */,
  "movement_duration_aic" REAL /* Akaike information criterion for movement duration */,
  "movement_duration_bic" REAL /* Bayesian information criterion for movement duration */,
  "peak_velocity_sse" REAL /* Sum of squared errors for peak velocity */,
  "peak_velocity_aic" REAL /* Akaike information criterion for peak velocity */,
  "peak_velocity_bic" REAL /* Bayesian information criterion for peak velocity */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor used to collect the data */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Exact time when the data was recorded */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant involved in the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movement_data_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movement_data_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., Movement Duration, Peak Velocity) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the parameter */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., continuous, categorical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the experiment */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being evaluated */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., SSE, AIC, BIC) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "calculation_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was calculated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
